# Phase 7 Governance Certification Summary Plan

This planning note records Phase 7.14 runtime governance era certification-summary architecture. It is read-only and non-executing.

## Scope

- governance era certification summary
- governance maturity certification
- runtime-containment certification
- constitutional continuity certification
- governance survivability certification
- institutional durability certification
- governance civilization certification assertions
- governance readiness declarations
- long-horizon governance certification continuity
- transition-readiness certification
- future-era governance handoff readiness
- governance certification review templates
- governance certification blockers and escalation

## Out Of Scope

- runtime authorization
- deployment authorization
- automated certification systems
- autonomous governance systems
- autonomous certification systems
- execution-capable governance systems
- machine-authorized governance
- runtime activation systems
- executable review systems
- runtime activation
- provider activation
- executable workflows
- deployment automation

## Completion Criteria

- Certification-summary planning remains subordinate to human governance review.
- Certification-summary doctrine cannot authorize execution.
- Governance maturity ambiguity fails closed.
- Certification continuity degradation blocks reuse.
- Traceability gaps block certification-summary interpretation use.
- Runtime-disabled truth remains preserved.
